name: Goodyear Credit Card
network: PROPRIETARY (Goodyear / Citi Retail Services, closed-loop, not Visa or Mastercard)
effective_cost: Free, with no annual fee, but purely a store-financing tool with no rewards and no use outside Goodyear and its fuel-station partners

verdict.text: A tire financing card, not rewards: only for a specific 0% purchase

earn_note: This card has no cash-back or points program. Its value proposition is deferred-interest financing ("no interest if paid in full within 6 months" on purchases of $250+) plus periodic rebates on tire purchases and welcome offers (e.g., $50 back on a first purchase of $250+). Unlike Citi's Best Buy or Wayfair co-brands, no open-loop Visa/Mastercard version of this card exists; it's a single, closed-loop product usable only at Goodyear's roughly 17,000 locations and about 11,500 participating Exxon and Mobil fuel stations.

points.note: No points or cash back exist on this card. Value comes entirely from promotional 0%-interest financing windows on qualifying purchases, which revert to a high standard variable APR (roughly 22%–27% per Citi's disclosures) if the balance isn't paid in full by the deadline, including retroactive interest back to the purchase date under deferred-interest terms.

transfer_partners.highlight: No rewards currency exists on this card, so there is nothing to transfer.

protection_note: None of the usual card protections apply: this is a closed-loop retail financing account, not a Visa/Mastercard, so there's no purchase protection, extended warranty, or travel insurance of any kind. $0 liability on unauthorized charges is the only fraud-related benefit found.
rental_note: No rental car coverage; this card can't be used for rentals or anywhere outside Goodyear locations and participating Exxon/Mobil stations.

services.name: Deferred-interest financing
services.detail: No interest if paid in full within 6 months on purchases of $250 or more; interest accrues retroactively from the purchase date if the balance isn't cleared by the deadline.

services.name: Welcome offer
services.detail: $50 back on a first purchase of $250+ (offer terms and expiration vary; confirmed valid through 12/31/2026 as of research).

services.name: Usable at partner fuel stations
services.detail: Accepted at over 17,000 Goodyear locations plus roughly 11,500 participating Exxon and Mobil fuel stations nationwide, broader than a typical single-retailer store card, but still closed-loop.

services.name: Periodic tire rebates
services.detail: Exclusive cardholder-only savings on select Goodyear tire purchases, offered periodically.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users
additional_cards.note: No distinct authorized-user program or benefit was found for this card; it's a single-purpose store-financing account.

timeline.text: Unlike several other Citi retail co-brands (Best Buy, Wayfair, Macy's), Goodyear has no open-loop Visa/Mastercard counterpart; this closed-loop card is the only product offered. Value comes entirely from 0%-interest promotional financing windows on tire and service purchases, not from earning rewards.
